summary: A live JSON read whose body comes back as HTML (the expired-session login page, served HTTP 200) must fail as an auth error, not be handed back as data.
reason: The Artistly app serves its login page as HTTP 200 HTML on an expired session. The generic read chokepoint (resolveReadWithStrategy / resolvePaginatedReadWithStrategy) returned that body verbatim with Source=live and no error, so designs list/by-folder shipped HTML as results with exit 0. Guard every live-read branch with assertLiveJSONBody (leading '<' -> authErr), matching parseDesigns/fetchCheckpoints, and check before writeThroughCache so HTML never enters the local store.
validated_outcome: ARTISTLY_SESSION_COOKIE=invalid artistly-pp-cli designs list --agent --select id now exits 4 with the auth message instead of exit 0 with HTML in results. go build/vet/test pass.
